title: KV Cache Offload 与层级存储
intent: Source-grounded reimplementation of vLLM's KV-offload subsystem: OffloadingManager + LRU/ARC policies + CPU/GPU async transfer handlers + connector taxonomy + scheduler-side reactive prefetch.
outline_subsections: 12.3 prefetch (reactive block-hash matching; reframe predictive ML)
12.5 CPU-side KV management (pin memory + async copy)

outline_reframes.claim: outline mentions NVMe SSD third tier
outline_reframes.reality: vLLM is 2-tier HBM<->CPU pinned; no nvme/ssd/disk/fs_offload in kv_offload/
outline_reframes.treatment: sidebar grounding (CXL/NVMe-over-fabric academic context); pivot to 2-tier reality

outline_reframes.reality: vLLM ships LRU + ARC (Megiddo-Modha 2003); no lfu.py at 98661fe
outline_reframes.treatment: ARC IS the production sophisticated alternative; LFU absence is honest

outline_reframes.reality: vLLM uses block-hash semantics; no token-level attention statistics (H2O is research, not vLLM)
outline_reframes.treatment: explicit grep evidence; punt to research forward-pointer

outline_reframes.reality: vLLM is REACTIVE block-hash matching via OffloadingConnectorScheduler.get_num_new_matched_tokens; no predictor/ml_prefetch
outline_reframes.treatment: walk the reactive lookup; disambiguate from speculative ML prefetch

source_files.purpose: OffloadingManager ABC + OffloadingSpec ABC + OffloadKey + LoadStoreSpec + PrepareStoreOutput + OffloadingEvent + CanonicalKVCaches
OffloadingSpecFactory.register_spec/create_spec lazy-loading registry
FilterReusedOffloadingManager wrapper (store_threshold filter)
CPUOffloadingSpec concrete spec for CPU DRAM tier
CPUOffloadingManager: pluggable CachePolicy + ref_cnt + events + prepare_store/load skeleton
BlockStatus(ctypes) + CachePolicy ABC; ref_cnt=-1 means not-ready sentinel
LRUCachePolicy (single OrderedDict)
ARCCachePolicy (T1/T2/B1/B2 ghost lists, target_t1_size adaptive split)
SharedOffloadRegion mmap-backed pinned memory carved across workers
SingleDirectionOffloadingHandler (per-direction CUDA stream queue) + CpuGpuOffloadingHandlers
OffloadingHandler ABC + OffloadingWorker (multi-handler dispatch)
SimpleCPUOffloadScheduler educational variant (lazy/eager modes, BlockPool reuse)
DmaCopyBackend cuMemcpyBatchAsync + load_stream + store_stream (TWO streams)
pin_tensor via cudaHostRegister (bypass PyTorch power-of-2 rounding)
SimpleCPUOffloadWorker pin + register_kv_caches + load_stream/store_stream
KVConnectorBase_V1 ABC + KVConnectorRole + KVConnectorMetadata + SupportsHMA
OffloadingConnector(KVConnectorBase_V1, SupportsHMA): canonical wiring of spec+scheduler+worker
SimpleCPUOffloadConnector minimal reference paired with simple_kv_offload/
OffloadingConnectorScheduler.get_num_new_matched_tokens reactive prefix lookup + sliding window lookup
OffloadingConnectorWorker handle_preemptions + start_kv_transfers + prepare_store_kv
